name: Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, maverick buying causes missed discounts. We provide procurement analytics instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Maverick buying leads to missed discounts and increased costs.
